name: signoz
description: Access SigNoz metrics, traces, logs, and dashboards.

tools.name: signoz_list_metrics
tools.description: Search and list available metrics from SigNoz over a time range (timeRange default 1h). Set source="meter" to list Cost Meter (usage/billing) metrics

tools.name: signoz_query_metrics
tools.description: Query metrics with smart aggregation defaults based on metric type; generated queries and formulas use limit 100 ordered by __result desc. Set source="meter" to query Cost Meter (usage/billing) data

tools.name: signoz_get_top_metrics
tools.description: Return top 100 metrics ranked by ingested sample volume with pre-computed percentages for cost and volume analysis

tools.name: signoz_check_metric_usage
tools.description: Given a list of metric names (up to 50 per call), return which dashboards and alerts reference each one. Each result has dashboards, alerts, and error fields — a non-empty error means the lookup is incomplete and any returned lists are partial

tools.name: signoz_check_metric_cardinality
tools.description: Return label/attribute keys for a single metric with their cardinality counts and sample values, sorted highest-cardinality first. The values field on each attribute entry contains a sample of actual label values, which helps determine whether high cardinality is real (e.g. UUIDs, pod IDs) or bounded (e.g. namespace names, status codes). Note: if the metric is not referenced in any dashboard or alert, dropping it outright eliminates its ingestion cost entirely — more impactful than trimming its labels.

tools.name: signoz_get_field_keys
tools.description: Get available field keys for metrics, traces, or logs

tools.name: signoz_get_field_values
tools.description: Get possible values for a field key for metrics, traces, or logs

tools.name: signoz_list_alerts
tools.description: List firing/silenced/inhibited Alertmanager alert *instances* (not rule definitions) with optional matcher/receiver filtering

tools.name: signoz_list_alert_rules
tools.description: List configured alert rules via GET /api/v2/rules, including inactive/OK and disabled rules

tools.name: signoz_get_alert
tools.description: Get an alert rule definition by id (param 'id') via GET /api/v2/rules/{id}. Response shape differs by server version (v2 Rule vs v1 GettableRule)

tools.name: signoz_get_alert_history
tools.description: Get alert firing history for a specific alert rule. Defaults to the last 6 hours. Use 'state' and 'filter' to narrow results. For the next page, pass data.nextCursor as 'cursor' and repeat the original query filters and time range.

tools.name: signoz_create_alert
tools.description: Create a new alert rule via POST /api/v2/rules. Threshold/PromQL rules use v2alpha1; anomaly rules use the v1 schema (top-level evalWindow/frequency, condition-level op/matchType/target/algorithm/seasonality)

tools.name: signoz_update_alert
tools.description: Update an existing alert rule by UUIDv7 (param 'id') via PUT /api/v2/rules/{id}

tools.name: signoz_delete_alert
tools.description: Delete an alert rule by UUIDv7 (param 'id') via DELETE /api/v2/rules/{id}

tools.name: signoz_list_dashboards
tools.description: List all dashboards with summaries

tools.name: signoz_get_dashboard
tools.description: Get full dashboard configuration by id (param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_create_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new monitoring dashboard

tools.name: signoz_update_dashboard
tools.description: Update an existing dashboard by id (param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_delete_dashboard
tools.description: Delete a dashboard by id (param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_import_dashboard
tools.description: Create a dashboard from a curated template in the SigNoz/dashboards GitHub repo by path

tools.name: signoz_list_dashboard_templates
tools.description: List the bundled curated SigNoz dashboard template catalog so the model can pick a template by intent

tools.name: signoz_list_services
tools.description: List services within a given time range

tools.name: signoz_get_service_top_operations
tools.description: Get top operations for a service

tools.name: signoz_list_views
tools.description: List SigNoz saved Explorer views for a given sourcePage (traces, logs, metrics, or meter for Cost Meter views), with optional name/category filters

tools.name: signoz_get_view
tools.description: Get a single SigNoz saved view by id (param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_search_docs
tools.description: Search official SigNoz documentation for any product, setup, instrumentation, deployment, configuration, API, or troubleshooting question

tools.name: signoz_fetch_doc
tools.description: Fetch full markdown for a single official SigNoz documentation page or heading from the local docs index

tools.name: signoz_create_view
tools.description: Create a new SigNoz saved Explorer view

tools.name: signoz_update_view
tools.description: Replace an existing SigNoz saved view (full-body PUT; param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_delete_view
tools.description: Delete a SigNoz saved view by id (param 'id')

tools.name: signoz_aggregate_logs
tools.description: Aggregate logs to compute statistics (count, avg, sum, min, max, percentiles) with canonical filter expressions; requestType scalar (default) or time_series; default limit 100 ordered by the primary aggregation; see signoz://logs/query-builder-guide

tools.name: signoz_search_logs
tools.description: Search logs with flexible filtering by service, severity, body text, and canonical filter expressions; see signoz://logs/query-builder-guide

tools.name: signoz_aggregate_traces
tools.description: Aggregate traces to compute statistics over spans, optionally grouped by fields, with canonical filter expressions; requestType scalar (default) or time_series; default limit 100 ordered by the primary aggregation; see signoz://traces/query-builder-guide

tools.name: signoz_search_traces
tools.description: Search traces with flexible filtering by service, operation, error, duration, and canonical filter expressions; see signoz://traces/query-builder-guide

tools.name: signoz_get_trace_details
tools.description: Get comprehensive trace information including all spans and hierarchy

tools.name: signoz_execute_builder_query
tools.description: Raw Query Builder v5 escape hatch for unsupported multi-query/formula shapes. Prefer search/aggregate/query_metrics tools; builder_query and builder_formula specs require positive limit plus v5 order (not dashboard orderBy), with type-aware defaults inserted and reported

tools.name: signoz_list_notification_channels
tools.description: List all configured notification channels

tools.name: signoz_create_notification_channel
tools.description: Create a notification channel and send a test notification

tools.name: signoz_update_notification_channel
tools.description: Update an existing notification channel and send a test notification

tools.name: signoz_get_notification_channel
tools.description: Get a single notification channel by ID

tools.name: signoz_delete_notification_channel
tools.description: Delete a notification channel by ID

resources.name: SigNoz Docs Sitemap
resources.description: Indexed sitemap used by signoz_search_docs and signoz_fetch_doc

resources.name: Logs Query Builder Guide
resources.description: SigNoz Query Builder v5 logs guide with filter syntax, field contexts, explicit raw/aggregate result bounds and ordering, body search, and executable examples

resources.name: Traces Query Builder Guide
resources.description: SigNoz Query Builder v5 traces guide with filter syntax, field contexts, explicit raw/aggregate result bounds and ordering, built-in span columns, and executable examples

resources.name: Metrics Aggregation Guide
resources.description: SigNoz Query Builder v5 metrics and formula guide with aggregation defaults, explicit limit 100 and __result ordering, Cost Meter examples, and whole-window top-N caveats

signoz_api_key.title: SigNoz API Key
signoz_api_key.description: API key for accessing SigNoz API
